title: Managed audit manual sandbox connection credential resolver disabled runtime shell design draft body intake

necessityProof.consumer: Node v336 body intake archive verification
necessityProof.whyV334CannotBeReused: Node v334 verifies the v333 outline intake archive, but it intentionally does not map the outline catalog to body intake sections or evidence requirements.
necessityProof.whyThisIsNotDesignDraftBody: v335 only maps future body sections to required evidence, allowed content, forbidden content, and stop conditions; it does not draft the design body.
necessityProof.stopCondition: Stop before any body draft, provider/client, credential value, raw endpoint URL, HTTP/TCP, Java write, mini-kv write/admin command, or automatic upstream start.

bodyIntake.sourceSpan: Node v334 disabled design draft outline archive verification

bodySections.title: Purpose and non-goals body intake
bodySections.requiredEvidence: Node v334 archive verification and v333 outline section catalog.
bodySections.allowedBodyContent: May map the future body paragraph to non-executable design intent and explicit non-goals.
bodySections.forbiddenBodyContent: Must not include runtime entry points, implementation tasks, provider/client code, or production rollout instructions.

bodySections.title: Input contract boundaries body intake
bodySections.requiredEvidence: Closed prerequisite artifacts, non-secret handles, review states, and archive evidence references.
bodySections.allowedBodyContent: May map already-approved non-secret inputs to body subsections.
bodySections.forbiddenBodyContent: Must not add new secret fields, raw URLs, credential values, or unreviewed handoff fields.

bodySections.title: Credential handle boundaries body intake
bodySections.requiredEvidence: Credential handle approval status, provenance, and non-value review markers.
bodySections.allowedBodyContent: May describe handle presence and approval provenance without value access.
bodySections.forbiddenBodyContent: Must not read, render, store, validate, derive, hash, or echo credential values.

bodySections.title: Endpoint handle boundaries body intake
bodySections.requiredEvidence: Endpoint handle allowlist approval status and non-raw endpoint evidence.
bodySections.allowedBodyContent: May describe endpoint handle IDs and allowlist review status.
bodySections.forbiddenBodyContent: Must not parse, render, or derive hostnames, ports, paths, query strings, or raw endpoint URLs.

bodySections.title: No-network safety boundaries body intake
bodySections.requiredEvidence: No-network safety fixture, disabled fake markers, and archived smoke proof.
bodySections.allowedBodyContent: May describe no-network proofs and future manual verification checkpoints.
bodySections.forbiddenBodyContent: Must not create HTTP/TCP clients, sockets, probes, request builders, or managed audit calls.

bodySections.title: Abort and rollback boundaries body intake
bodySections.requiredEvidence: Abort/rollback semantics contract and no-write evidence.
bodySections.allowedBodyContent: May describe stop states, manual review checkpoints, and rollback prohibition proof.
bodySections.forbiddenBodyContent: Must not execute Java SQL, deployment, rollback, ledger writes, schema migration, or mini-kv write/admin commands.

bodySections.title: Operator approval boundaries body intake
bodySections.requiredEvidence: Signed human approval artifact, operator identity, audit correlation ID, and provenance evidence.
bodySections.allowedBodyContent: May map approval evidence to future body subsections.
bodySections.forbiddenBodyContent: Must not convert approval evidence into execution permission, connection permission, or automatic promotion.

bodySections.title: Verification and stop conditions body intake
bodySections.requiredEvidence: Archive verification, historical fallback, screenshot, route, Markdown, digest, and cleanup evidence.
bodySections.allowedBodyContent: May define body draft verification gates and stop conditions.
bodySections.forbiddenBodyContent: Must not skip Node v336 archive verification or continue if any credential, network, provider/client, Java write, mini-kv write/admin, or auto-start condition appears.

evidenceCatalog.source: Node v333 outline intake archived JSON/Markdown/smoke/screenshot
Closed credential-handle and endpoint-handle prerequisite evidence
No-network, no Java write, and no mini-kv write/admin evidence
Signed approval and operator-boundary prerequisite evidence

stopConditions.condition: The next step asks v335 to draft the actual design body.
The next step requires reading or rendering credential values.
The next step requires parsing or rendering a raw endpoint URL.
The next step requires instantiating a provider, resolver client, or fake client.
The next step requires HTTP/TCP or managed audit network access.
The next step requires Java SQL, deployment, rollback, ledger, or schema writes.
The next step requires mini-kv LOAD, COMPACT, RESTORE, SETNXEX, or write commands.
The next step requires automatically starting Java, mini-kv, or external services.

warnings.message: v335 maps body sections and evidence only; it does not draft the disabled runtime shell design body.

recommendations.message: Use Node v336 to verify the v335 route, Markdown, digest, screenshot, and historical fallback before drafting any body.

nextActions: Archive Node v335 as a body intake record before drafting any disabled runtime shell design body.
Use Node v336 to verify the v335 route, Markdown, digest, screenshot, and historical fallback before any body draft.
Do not request Java or mini-kv echo until a later version defines new non-secret handoff fields that need upstream confirmation.
Pause before any credential value, raw endpoint URL, provider/client, HTTP/TCP, Java write, mini-kv write/admin command, or automatic upstream start.
